violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Bags of frozen food open and not in use in the reach-in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Bottom of the reach in freezer holding pizzas needs to be cleaned. The left microwave in the customer area needs to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use cups stored in the dry storage were on the ground.
